title: Daring Crunchy Australian Almonds Wrap
description: Fermented, crunchy and adventurous Australian dish featuring almond extract, air-fried almonds, and corn-husk wraps.
instructions: In a bowl combine toasted almonds, almond extract, soy sauce, rice vinegar, maple syrup, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, and salt; stir until coated.
Place the coated almonds in the air fryer basket and cook for 8 minutes, shaking halfway through, until crunchy and fragrant.
While almonds are baking gently warm corn husk wraps in a dry skillet for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
Remove the almonds from the air fryer and let them cool for 2 minutes.
Spread a thin layer of almond mixture onto each corn husk wrap, leaving a small border.
Roll the wrap tightly, sealing the edge with a small splash of water if needed.
Place the wrapped bundles back into the air fryer and cook for 4 minutes to crisp the exterior.
Let the wraps cool for 1 minute before serving; cut in half if desired.
